title: Role Boundary Summary
description: Print-ready reference: within-scope tasks versus escalate-to-clinician topics. Open in browser to print or save as PDF; editable in Word if needed. Aligns with Volume 1 Week 1 coordinated-clinic framing.

title: Consultation Support Note Template
description: Structured first-contact / history-capture layout with handover checks. Volume 2 Week 5 alignment. Neutral, non-diagnostic wording; transfer to your EMR or clinic-approved form.

title: Screening Red Flag Checklist
description: Pause-pathway indicators and documentation prompts. Volume 2 Week 6. Does not replace clinical triage — supports coordinator classification and escalation.

title: Patient Education Talking Points
description: Scope-safe stems and high-risk phrases to avoid. Volume 2 Week 8 educate-broadly / defer-specifically discipline.

title: Doctor Handover Template
description: Concise clinician-facing summary: evidence alignment, caution flags, focused questions. Volume 3 Week 9. Pair with your clinic photo SOP and angle checklist.

title: Pre-Operative Preparation Checklist
description: Operational readiness rows plus anxiety-versus-uncertainty cue. Volume 3 Week 10. Not medical clearance — clinical sign-off per policy.

title: Post-Operative Follow-Up Contact Log
description: Repeatable table for date, channel, patient report, bounded response, escalation, and clinical follow-up arranged. Volume 3 Week 11. No remote diagnosis or prescribing language.

title: Escalation Prompt Sheet
description: Patient-facing routing stems for screening, follow-up, and difficult encounters. Also linked from presentation and screening modules for red-flag discipline. Replace bracketed roles with your local titles and pathways.

title: Consultation QA Spot-Check Checklist
description: Mini-audit criteria for notes, scope language, handover quality, and system reflection. Volume 3 Week 12 support-role lens; formal governance audit remains with authorised leads.
